Opcode.name: PCM_OP_CUST_SET_TAXINFO
Opcode.Doc:
Adds or updates the tax information in the account object. This opcode adds or updates the following data:
VAT certificate
Tax exemptions
Tax incorporation
Tax residence

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object action was applied to.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SESSION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Session object in which event took place, null means none.

String.name: PIN_FLD_VAT_CERT
String.Doc: VAT certificate, if the field is omitted then vat certificate in the account object will be replaced with "".

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RESIDENCE_FLAG
Enum.Doc:
Residence Flag. Possible values are:
PIN_RATE_RES_RESIDENTIAL(0),
PIN_RATE_RES_BUSINESS(1). Default value is PIN_RATE_RES_RESIDENTIAL(0).

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_INCORPORATED_FLAG
Enum.Doc:
Incorporated Flag. Possible values are:
PIN_RATE_INC_INCORPORATED(0),
PIN_RATE_INC_UNINCORPORATED(1). Default value is PIN_RATE_INC_INCORPORATED(0).

Array.name: PIN_FLD_EXEMPTIONS
Array.Doc: Exemptions array, if the array is omitted all exemptions elements in the account object is deleted; replaced otherwise.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE
Enum.Doc:
Exemption type. Possible values are:
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_FED(0),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_STATE(1),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_COUNTY(2),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_CITY(3),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_SEC_COUNTY(4),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_SEC_CITY(5),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_TERRITORY(6),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_SEC_STATE(7),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_DISTRICT(8),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_SEC_FED(9),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_COUNTY_DISTRICT(10),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_CITY_DISTRICT(11),
PIN_RATE_TAX_JUR_OTHER(12).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Certificate is valid from this date.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Certificate is valid until this date. If no value is provided, or a value of 0 is provided, the validity is forever.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_FIELD
Array.Doc:
Validation error fields array. Each element describes a field that failed validation. Element id is not significant.
The following fields are included on the output flist only if there was an ebuf error during the operation.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_ELEMENT_ID
Int.Doc: Element id of field that failed (if an array element).

Array.name: PIN_FLD_FIELD
Array.Doc:
For FIELDs array elements that do not contain a nested FIELDs array, the field that failed (as defined by PIN_FLD_FIELD_NUM) is included here on the flist. This field is MANDATORY in this case and its value represents either the bad value specified or a suggested replacement value for the field.
In cases where this FIELDs element does contain a nested FIELDs array, the field defined by PIN_FLD_FIELD_NUM is not included in the output flist.
For the following values of PIN_FLD_RESULT, the field value will be NULL:
PIN_CUST_VAL_ERR_MISSING.
For the following values of PIN_FLD_RESULT, the field value contains the bad value that was specified:
PIN_CUST_VAL_ERR_MIN_LEN,
PIN_CUST_VAL_ERR_MAX_LEN,
PIN_CUST_VAL_ERR_FORMAT,
PIN_CUST_VAL_ERR_INVALID.
For the following values of PIN_FLD_RESULT, the field value contains a suggested replacement value for the field:
PIN_CUST_VAL_ERR_DUPE.
Nested fields array. If field that failed was in a sub-flist, the fields arrays are nested to provide an absolute path to the exact field that failed. This nesting can be to any depth to reflect multi-level sub-flists.
NOTE: if more than one field on the same sub-flist failed validation, then more than one element of the FIELDs array will be included within the nesting to reflect the fields that failed.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
